content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(ii) WARN — NSCameraUsageDescription is generic ("This app needs camera access.", Info.plist:9) and NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription is a "TODO" placeholder (Info.plist:11) with no location usage found in code.
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose purpose strings don't explain the specific user benefit, and a literal "TODO" is an almost certain rejection. The camera string should say why (e.g., "to scan documents", matching ScannerView.swift:12), and the location key appears unused — either remove it or add a real, feature-specific description. Fix both before submission.
